Finding Content in Deeply Nested HTML

Some websites wrap their content in many layers of div elements. This is common in CMS-generated HTML, WordPress themes, and React-rendered pages.

A good content extractor should be able to find the article text regardless of how deeply nested it is. The nesting depth should not affect extraction quality.

Even content nested inside additional wrappers within the article should be captured. This paragraph is inside a div.inner-block inside a div.content-block.
